name: camera-shake
title: CameraShake
description: Wraps children with a subtle, deterministic camera shake that decays to rest. Driven by Remotion's seeded random() so the same seed always produces the same shake — no Math.random in the render path.
pickWhen: an impact moment needs physical weight — explosion, drop, score reveal. A wrapper, not a layer; place around the thing that should feel hit.
